summary: The team agreed to build a V1 prototype tracking the upcoming Knicks schedule and Jalen Brunson's recent scoring trends. While a CLI was discussed as the default, the confirmed direction is a minimalist web dashboard using local fixture data to ensure deterministic behaviour without network variance. Acceptance checks: executes via a simple run command, accurately calculates 5-game and 3-game averages, correctly flags 3-game averages of 30 or above, uses static historical data with no forecasting, and maintains a factual, neutral tone.
